evil.name: Evil
sources: Pathfinder #143: Borne by the Sun's Grace
description: ::list[Deities]{link=faith all="Abraxas~Achaekek~Aesdurath~Ah Pook~Ahriman~Ajids~Aksha~Akuma~Alazhra~Aldinach~Alichino~Alocer~Ananshea~Andak~Andirifkhu~Angazhan~Anogetz~Apep~Apollyon~Arazni~Ardad Lili~Areshkagal~Arlachramas~Aroggus~Asmodeus~Atlach-Nacha~Ayrzul~Baalzebul~Baphomet~Barbariccia~Barbatos~Barravoclair~Belial~Bifrons~Bohga~Braismois~Bundha~Caera~Cagnazzo~Calcabrina~Camazotz~Chamiaholom~Charg~Charon~Chaugnar Faugn~Chavazvug~Chimon~Chinostes (Evil Aspect)~Chugarra~Chupurvagasti~Circiatto~Cixyron~Corosbel~Crocell~Cthulhu~Cyth-V'sug~Dachzerul~Daclau-Sar~Dagon~Dahak~Deskari~Deumus~Dhalavei~Diceid~Dispater~Doloras~Dradjit~Draghignazzo~Dretha~Droskar~Ealdeez~Eaqueo~Eiseth~Eligos~Farfarello~Fharaas~Flauros~Folca~Fumeiyoshi~Furcas~Gaap~Gavidya~General Susumu~Geon~Geryon~Ghatanothoa~Ghlaunder~Gogunta~Graffiacane~Guyuku~Gyronna~Haagenti~Haborym~Hadregash~Haggakal~Hastrikhal~Hastur~Hataam~Hshurha~Hudima~Hydim~Iaozrael~Iggeret~Inkariax~Inma~Ioramvol~Isph-Aun-Vuln~Ithaqua~Izyagna~Jacarkas~Jezelda~Jiraviddain~Jubilex~Jyotah~Kabriri~Kaikyton~Kalma~Kelizandri~Kitumu~Kostchtchie~Kro'akoth~Kunkarna~Lady Nanbyo~Laivatiniel~Lamashtu~Lanishra~Lao Shu Po~Libicocco~Lissala~Llamolaek~Lorcan~Lorthact~Losarkur~Maeha~Mahathallah~Malacoda~Malthus~Mammon~Mazmezz~Menxyr~Mephistopheles~Mestama~Minderhal~Mneoc~Moloch~Mordiggian~Morrobahn~Murnath~Muronna~Mursha~Nalmungder~Nameless~Nataka~Nergal~Nhimbaloth~Nightripper~Nocticula~Norgorber~Nulgreth~Nurgal~Nyarlathotep (Black Pharaoh)~Nyarlathotep (Faceless Sphinx)~Nyarlathotep (Haunter of the Dark)~Oaur-Ooung~Onamahli~Ongalte~Onmyuza~Orcus~Orgesh~Ose~Osolmyr~Otikaya~Ovonovo~Ozranvial~Pavnuri~Pazuzu~Pirias~Prihasta~Quindiovatos~Raetorgash~Ragadahn~Rahu~Rasvocel~Ravana~Rhan-Tegoth~Roqorolos~Rovagug~Ruapceras~Rubicante~Rull~Ruzel~Rytara~Sabnach~Scal~Scarmiglione~Set~Sezelrian~Shamira~Shawnari~Shax~Shiggarreb~Shivaska~Shub-Niggurath~Sicva~Sifkesh~Sithhud~Slandrais~Socothbenoth~Stygidvod~Sugroz~Surpa~Szuriel~Tamede~Taraksun~Thamir Gixx~The Green Mother~Thremyr~Thuskchoon~Titivilus~Treerazer~Trelmarixian~Tresmalvos~Tsathoggua~Uaransaph~Ulon~Urazra~Urgathoa~Uruskreil~Urxehl~Ushitora~Uzumae~Vapula~Varg~Velgaas~Venkelvore~Verex~Vermilion Mother~Vevelor~Vibhishah~Vois~Vorasha~Wylgart~Xhamen-Dor~Xhasnaphar~Xiquiripat~Xoveron~Xsistaid~Yabu~Yaezhing~Yamasoth~Yan-gant-y-tan~Ydersius~Yhidothrus~Ymeri~Zabha~Zaebos~Zagresh~Zaigasnar~Zarongel~Zelishkar~Zepar~Zevgavizeb~Zipacna~Zogmugot~Zon-Kuthon~Zura~Zurapadyn~Zursvaater~Zyphus"}
@HL[Granted Powers:] You are sinister and cruel, and have wholly pledged your soul to the cause of evil.

::ab[Touch of Evil (Sp)]{id=touch icon=touch ability="You can cause a creature to become ‹misc/sickened› as a melee touch attack. Creatures sickened by your touch count as good for the purposes of spells with the evil descriptor. This ability lasts for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum 1)." useMod=Wis3}

::ab[Scythe of Evil (Su)]{id=evil l=8 icon=boost standard="You can give a weapon touched the ‹magic-enh/unholy› special weapon quality for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level." useInc="4~cleric~8" useF="8~1~4"}

::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="protection from good~align weapon|evil only~magic circle against good~unholy blight~dispel good~create undead~blasphemy~unholy aura~summon monster IX|evil spell only" save=domain}

::ab[Consume the Enemy (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of evil/#touch›› ability of the Evil domain" icon=melee provokes fullround="As an ‹spelldef/evil› act, you can bite a helpless living or freshly killed creature, dealing 1d3 points of damage. By consuming the creature's flesh, you gain a profane bonus on saving throw DCs for all spells, spell-like abilities, and supernatural abilities you use against creatures of the same type (and subtype, if humanoid or outsider) as the cannibalized creature. The profane bonus is equal to 1 + ‹misc/one-fifth› of your cleric level. This effect lasts for a number of minutes equal to 1/2 your cleric level or until you use this ability against a different creature." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="magic fang" l2="enemy's heart" l3="greater magic fang"}

::ab[Spark Malfeasance (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹scythe of evil/#evil›› ability of the Evil domain" l=8 icon=zap ability="You can awaken the sinful desires of a target within 30 feet with a ranged touch attack. The target suffers extreme guilt and is ‹misc/sickened› for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level. To end the effect earlier, the target can willingly commit an evil act (if it is of good alignment) or attempt a Will save (DC = 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier) at the beginning of its turn each round. Creatures that succeed at their saving throws are immune to this ability for 24 hours." useInc="4~cleric~8" useF="8~1~4"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2=suggestion l6="greater bestow curse"}
‹family/Daemon«s› are a race of neutral evil outsiders.

::ab[Whispering Evil (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹scythe of evil/#evil›› power of the Evil domain" l=8 icon=aura standard="You can whisper a hypnotizing litany of empty promises. Each enemy within a 30-foot ‹misc/emanation› that can hear you must succeed on a Will saving throw or become ‹misc/fascinated› for as long as you continue the litany." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="cause fear" l3="vampiric touch" l6="planar binding|daemons only"}

::ab[Faith-Stealing Strike (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of evil/#touch›› ability of the Evil domain" icon=melee ability="You can make a single melee attack using your highest base attack bonus against a creature capable of casting divine spells. If you damage the creature, it must succeed at a Will save (DC = 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier) or be unable to cast any divine spells for 1 round. If you do not damage your target with the attack, this ability is expended with no effect." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="align weapon|chaos or evil only" l6="corrosive consumption"}
‹family/Demon«s› are a race of chaotic evil outsiders.

::ab[Fury of the Abyss (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of evil/#touch›› power of the Evil domain" icon=boost swift="You can give yourself an enhancement bonus equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum +1) on melee attacks, melee damage rolls, and combat maneuver checks. This bonus lasts for 1 round. During this round, you take a -2 penalty to AC." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=doom l3=rage l6="planar binding|demons only"}
‹family/Devil«s› are a race of lawful evil outsiders.

::ab[Hell's Corruption (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of evil/#touch›› power of the Evil domain" icon=touch-roll ability="You can cause a creature to become more susceptible to corruption as a melee touch attack. Creatures touched take a -2 penalty on all saving throws and must roll all opposed skill checks twice, taking the worse result. This effect lasts for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum 1)." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=command l3=suggestion l6="planar binding|devils only"}
‹SOURCE Book of the Damned/180;Inner Sea Gods/225;Blood of Fiends/15›

::ab[Feed on Fear (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹scythe of evil/#evil›› power of the Evil domain" l=8 icon=melee immediate="Upon successfully landing a melee attack on a creature that is already suffering from a fear effect, you can deal 2d6 extra points of damage and gain an equal amount of ‹rule/temporary hit points›. These temporary hit points last for 24 hours or until lost." useInc="4~cleric~8" useF="8~1~4"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="cause fear" l3=scare l4=fear}

::ab[Pain Is Power (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹scythe of evil/#evil›› ability of the Evil domain" l=8 icon=def immediate="After taking damage from any source, you may attempt a DC 25 ‹rule/concentration› check. If you succeed, you gain the benefits of a ‹spell/blessing of fervor› spell for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level. If you fail, this ability is expended with no effect." useInc="4~cleric~8" useF="8~1~4"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="delay pain" l2="instrument of agony" l3=agonize l5="symbol of pain"}

::ab[Touch of Virulence (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of evil/#touch›› power of the Evil domain" icon=touch standard="You can touch a diseased creature and exacerbate its condition. If it fails a Fortitude save (DC = 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier), the creature takes damage as though it had failed its Fortitude save against the disease and any remaining onset time for the disease ends." useInc="6~cleric~8" useF="8~1~6"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="ray of sickening" l3=contagion l6="plague storm" l8="horrid wilting"}
‹SOURCE Pathfinder #143: Borne by the Sun's Grace/61›

::ab[Touch of Paranoia (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of evil/#touch›› power of the Evil domain" icon=touch ability="You can imbue a target with great suspicion and doubt as a melee touch attack. A creature affected by your touch does not have allies and is not considered to be an ally to any other creature, including other creatures affected by this effect. The affected creature cannot move freely through its allies' spaces, ‹rule/flank› creatures with them, cooperate with them using teamwork feats, or give or receive benefits from the ‹rule/aid another<_2› action or any spells or effect that affects only allies. This ability lasts for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum 1)." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="haunting mists" l4="they know" l6=phobia}

devil.name: Devil and Kyton
description: These subdomains are associated with both the ‹domain/Law› and ‹domain/Evil› domains.

glory.name: Glory
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You are infused with the glory of the divine, and are a true foe of the undead.
::ab[Channel Boost (Su)]{id=boost icon=boost passive="When you ‹ability/channel positive energy› to harm undead creatures, the save DC to halve the damage is increased by 2."}

::ab[Touch of Glory (Sp)]{id=touch icon=boost standard="You can cause your hand to shimmer with divine radiance, allowing you to touch a creature and give it a bonus equal to your cleric level on a single Charisma-based skill check or Charisma ability check. This ability lasts for 1 hour or until the creature touched elects to apply the bonus to a roll." useMod=Wis3}

::ab[Divine Presence (Su)]{id=div l=8 icon=protect standard="You can emit a 30-foot aura of divine presence. All allies within this aura are treated as if under the effects of a ‹spell/sanctuary› spell with a DC equal to 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier. If an ally leaves the area or makes an attack, the effect ends for that ally. If you make an attack, the effect ends for you and your allies." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="shield of faith~bless weapon~searing light~holy smite~righteous might~undeath to death~holy sword~holy aura~gate" save=domain}

::ab[Bolstering Touch (Sp)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of glory/#touch›› power of the Glory domain" icon=protect standard="You can touch a willing creature, bracing it against frightening situations and allowing it to remain calm. The first fear effect that would affect the subject within the next hour is suppressed for the first 1d4 rounds of its effect. If you touch a creature currently suffering from an ongoing fear effect, this ability instead suppresses the ongoing fear effect for 1 round. The rounds during which the subject ignores the triggering fear effect still count against the effect's duration. If the fear effect is suppressed for longer than it lasts, the subject isn't affected by the fear effect at all." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="remove fear" l3=heroism l6="greater heroism"}

::ab[Aura of Heroism (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹divine presence/#div›› power of the Glory domain" l=8 icon=boost swift="You can emit a 30-foot aura of heroism. Allies in the area are treated as if they were under the effects of ‹spell/heroism›." useL=cleric useNC}

::ab[Honor Bound (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of glory/#touch›› power of the Glory domain" icon=protect-def standard="With a touch, you can remind a creature of its duties and responsibilities, granting it a new saving throw against each enchantment (charm) or enchantment (compulsion) effect that currently affects it. If the saving throw is successful, the enchantment effect is ended. This power only affects effects that allow a save. If you fail a save against such an effect, you can use this ability as an @HLimmediate_action to grant yourself an additional save. Once the target (either you or a touched creature) has made one additional save per effect, this ability has no further effect on that particular enchantment effect." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="zone of truth" l6="geas/quest"}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}
::ab[Class Skill]{icon=skill replace="The ‹‹channel boost/#boost›› ability of the Glory domain" passive="You gain ‹skill/Intimidate› (CHA) as a class skill."}

::ab[Divine Demand (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹divine presence/#div›› ability of the Glory domain" l=6 icon=boost swift="You can petition your divine patron for far greater power than you deserve. This ability can be used only as you cast a spell that has a reduced (but not negated) effect on a successful save. The saving throw DC of the spell increases by 2, and you gain a +2 bonus on caster level checks to overcome spell resistance with the spell. Any creature that succeeds at the saving throw instead avoids the effect entirely. If half or more of the targets are unaffected, you become ‹misc/shaken› for a number of rounds equal to the spell's level. If all of the targets are unaffected, you instead lose the ability to cast divine spells, channel energy, and use domain powers for 1d4+1 rounds; you can end this loss by loudly apologizing to your patron deity as a @HLfull-round_action that provokes attacks of opportunity." useInc="4~cleric~6" useF="6~1~4"}

::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l4="hollow heroism" l7="greater hollow heroism" l9="overwhelming presence" extra="If you are evil, replace the domain spells *bless weapon* and *holy aura* with ‹spell/aid› and ‹spell/unholy aura› respectively."}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}

::ab[Bonus Feat]{replace="The ‹‹channel boost/#boost›› ability of the Glory domain" icon=power passive="In campaigns that use the optional ‹rule/hero point<s› system, you gain ‹feat/Hero's Fortune› as a bonus feat. Otherwise, you gain ‹feat/Marked for Glory› as a bonus feat, even if you do not meet its prerequisites."}

::ab[Witness the Legend (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹divine presence/#div›› ability of the Glory domain" l=8 icon=magic move="You can extol the virtues of yourself or an ally within 60 feet that you can see. This causes the target to shed light like a ‹eq-misc/torch› for 1 minute, and while the effect lasts, you can expend a daily use of your *touch of glory* domain ability as an immediate action to add 1d6 to an attack, saving throw, skill check, or ability check attempted by the target; for a roll to confirm a critical hit or save against a fear effect, you instead add 1d12." useInc="4~cleric~8" useF="8~1~4"}

::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2=aid l3="contagious zeal" l4="righteous vigor" l6="unshakeable zeal" extra="If you are evil, replace the domain spells *holy smite, holy sword,* and *holy aura* with ‹spell/unholy blight›, ‹spell/unholy sword›, and ‹spell/unholy aura› respectively."}

hubris.name: Hubris
description: This subdomain is associated with both the ‹domain/Glory› and ‹domain/Nobility› domains.

good.name: Good
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You have pledged your life and soul to goodness and purity.

::ab[Touch of Good (Sp)]{id=touch icon=protect-boost standard="You can touch a creature, granting a sacred bonus on attack rolls, skill checks, ability checks, and saving throws equal to half your cleric level (minimum 1) for 1 round." useMod=Wis3}

::ab[Holy Lance (Su)]{id=lance l=8 icon=boost standard="You can give a weapon you touch the ‹magic-enh/holy› special weapon quality for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level." useInc="4~cleric~8" useF="8~1~4"}

::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="protection from evil~align weapon|good only~magic circle against evil~holy smite~dispel evil~blade barrier~holy word~holy aura~summon monster IX|good spell only" save=domain}
‹family/Agathion«s› are a race of neutral good outsiders.

::ab[Protective Aura (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹holy lance/#lance›› power of the Good domain" l=8 icon=protect standard="You can emit a 30-foot protective aura. Allies in this aura receive a +2 deflection bonus to AC and a +2 resistance bonus on all saving throws. In addition, allies in the area gain the benefits of ‹spell/protection from evil› (although the AC bonus and saving throw bonus do not stack with those granted by this effect)." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="shield of faith" l3=tongues l6="planar ally|agathions only"}
‹family/Archon«s› are a race of lawful good outsiders.

::ab[Aura of Menace (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹holy lance/#lance›› power of the Good domain" l=8 icon=lower standard="You can emit a 30-foot aura of menace. Enemies in this aura take a -2 penalty to AC and on attacks and saves as long as they remain inside the aura." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="divine favor" l3=prayer l6="planar ally|archon only"}
‹family/Azata«s› are a race of chaotic good outsiders.

::ab[Elysium's Call (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of good/#touch›› power of the Good domain" icon=roll-protect-boost standard="With a touch, you can imbue creatures with the spirit of Elysium, lifting their spirits and freeing them from bonds. The creatures touched can immediately reroll any failed saving throws against spells and spell-like abilities of the enchantment (charm) and enchantment (compulsion) subschools. In addition, targets receive a +2 sacred bonus on such saving throws and a +2 sacred bonus on CMB checks to escape a grapple. Finally, targets can ignore up to 5 feet of ‹rule/difficult terrain› each round, as if they had the ‹feat/Nimble Moves› feat. These bonuses last for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum 1), although the saving throw reroll only applies when the creature is touched." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="expeditious retreat" l3=fly l6="planar ally|azata only"}

::ab[Powerful Bond (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹touch of good/#touch›› power of the Good domain" icon=magic free="You can open a link to communicate telepathically with a single ally within 60 feet. The telepathic link is two-way and lasts for 1 minute. Unlike normal telepathy, this ability requires a shared language." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="shield other" l5="telepathic bond"}

::ab[Aura of Sanctification (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹holy lance/#lance›› ability of the Good domain" l=8 icon=aura immediate="You can emit a 30-foot-radius aura of sanctification. Within this aura, effects that are specifically harmful to good-aligned creatures are inverted so that they no longer harm good creatures and instead harm evil creatures. Similarly, effects that are specifically beneficial to evil creatures instead become beneficial only to good creatures." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2=qualm l4="forced repentance" l5=atonement}

archon.name: Archon
description: This subdomain is associated with both the ‹domain/Good› and ‹domain/Law› domains.

healing.name: Healing
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] Your touch staves off pain and death, and your healing magic is particularly vital and potent.

::ab[Rebuke Death (Sp)]{id=rebuke icon=aid standard="You can touch a living creature, healing it for 1d4 points of damage plus 1 for every two cleric levels you possess. You can only use this ability on a creature that is below 0 hit points." useMod=Wis3}

::ab[Healer's Blessing (Su)]{id=bless l=6 icon=power passive="At 6th level, all of your ‹main/cure spells› are treated as if they were empowered, increasing the amount of damage healed by half (+50%). This does not apply to damage dealt to undead with a cure spell. This does not stack with the ‹feat/Empower Spell› metamagic feat."}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="cure light wounds~cure moderate wounds~cure serious wounds~cure critical wounds~breath of life~heal~regenerate~mass cure critical wounds~mass heal" save=domain}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}

::ab[Blessed Surgery (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹rebuke death/#rebuke›› power of the Healing domain" icon=aid-roll flavor="Your divine patron guides your healing hands, allowing you to perform minor miracles with mundane cures." ability="You can use this ability when using the Heal skill in order to roll the check twice and take the higher result. When you're using this ability, any use of the Heal skill requiring 1 hour instead takes at most 1 minute." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="diagnose disease" l2="placebo effect"}

::ab[Restorative Touch (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹rebuke death/#rebuke›› power of the Healing domain" icon=aid flavor="You can touch a creature, letting the healing power of your deity flow through you to relieve the creature of a minor condition." standard="Your touch can remove the ‹misc/dazed›, ‹misc/fatigued›, ‹misc/shaken›, ‹misc/sickened›, or ‹misc/staggered› condition. You choose which condition is removed." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="remove disease" l4="neutralize poison" l5="break enchantment"}

::ab[Gift of Life (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹healer's blessing/#bless›› power of the Healing domain" l=8 icon=aid standard="You can touch a creature that has died within the past minute to grant it a few moments of life. The dead creature returns to life for a number of rounds equal to your cleric level. Creatures returned to life in this way have a number of hit points equal to half your cleric level, and continue to be affected by any still-active spells, conditions, or afflictions present at the time of their death. At the end of this time, the creature dies again. The creature is free to act as it sees fit during this time. You are granted no control over it." useInc="4~cleric~8" useF="8~1~4"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l5="raise dead" l7=resurrection l9="true resurrection"}

A cleric (or any other character capable of selecting a domain) who worships the deity in question can choose to gain the variant domain power upon first gaining the domain in question, but the choice to replace the domain power must be made immediately upon gaining access to that domain and cannot be changed thereafter.

Through ‹faith/Irori«'s› teachings, impurities in oneself and in the world are overcome. Irori's followers are some of the most self-disciplined of Golarion's faithful, believing that knowledge is the best weapon one can wield against the shackles of possession. They rarely directly involve themselves in battling those intruding forces, instead hoping the afflicted can overcome their situations through their own force of will. Haunts are the one exception to this mantra of non-intervention. As spirits beyond the mortal cycle, haunts are often targeted by the servants of Irori as being stains on the delicate fabric of the world.

::ab[Exorcise Haunt (Sp)]{replace="The ‹‹rebuke death/#rebuke›› domain power of the Healing domain" icon=zap standard="You can emit a ‹misc/burst› of positive energy. Any haunt within 15 feet of you takes 1d8 points of damage plus 1 for every 2 cleric levels you have." useMod=Wis3}

knowledge.name: Knowledge
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You are a scholar and a sage of legends.
::ab[Class Skills (Ex)]{icon=skill passive="You treat all ‹skill/Knowledge› skills (INT) as class skills."}

::ab[Lore Keeper (Sp)]{id=lore icon=touch ability="You can touch a creature to learn about its abilities and weaknesses. With a successful touch attack, you gain information as if you made the appropriate Knowledge skill check with a result equal to 15 + your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier."}

::ab[Remote Viewing (Sp)]{id=rem l=6 icon=magic standard="You can use ‹spell/clairvoyance/clairaudience› at will as a spell-like ability using your cleric level as the caster level." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="comprehend languages~detect thoughts~speak with dead~divination~true seeing~find the path~legend lore~discern location~foresight" save=domain}
‹family/Aeon«s› are a race of neutral outsiders.

::ab[Void Form (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹remote viewing/#rem›› ability of the Knowledge domain" l=6 icon=boost standard="You can become semi-tangible. While in this form, you are immune to critical hits and gain a deflection bonus to AC equal to ‹misc/one-fourth› of your cleric level." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=sanctuary l5="telepathic bond" l6="planar binding|aeons only"}

::ab[Teaching Moment (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹remote viewing/#rem›› power of the Knowledge domain" l=8 icon=roll immediate="When you or an ally within 30 feet rolls a natural 1 or a natural 20 on an attack roll, an ability check, a skill check, or a saving throw, you can grant all allies within 30 feet special insights that help them overcome similar challenges. Once during the next minute, each affected creature can choose to roll twice and take the better result before attempting an attack roll, ability check, skill check, or saving throw." useInc="4~cleric~8" useF="8~1~4"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="know the enemy" l2="fox's cunning" l6="battlemind link" l8="circle of clarity"}

::ab[Deep Cover (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹lore keeper/#lore›› power of the Knowledge domain" icon=def ability="When you prepare your spells, you can also choose one cover identity - whether that of a real person or a fictitious one. You can assume the disguise of your cover identity in half the normal amount of time. When targeted by a spell or effect that would compromise your chosen disguise (such as ‹spell/detect evil›, ‹spell/detect thoughts›, or ‹spell/zone of truth›), as an immediate action you can force the creature using the ability to attempt a Will save (DC = 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier). If the creature fails, it gains false information in keeping with your cover identity. You can use this false information ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="anonymous interaction" l4="zone of silence" l8="mind blank"}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Abraxas~Aerekostes~Andoletta~Bergelmir~Braismois~Calcabrina~Calistria~Charon~Crocell~Dranngvit~Erecura~Eritrice~Fandarra~Farfarello~Fharaas~Hydim~Irori~Kabriri~Kroina~Lissala~Lissala (pre-Earthfall)~Malthus~Mazludeh~Mephistopheles~Norgorber~Nyarlathotep (Black Pharaoh)~Nyarlathotep (Faceless Sphinx)~Nyarlathotep (Haunter of the Dark)~Pharasma~Qi Zhong~Rytara~Shawnari~Sivanah~Stygidvod~The Lost Prince~Thoth~Titivilus~Ulon~Vapula~Velgaas~Yog-Sothoth~Yuelral"}

::ab[Recall (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹lore keeper/#lore›› power of the Knowledge domain" icon=roll-boost standard="With a touch, you can cause a creature to recall some bit of forgotten lore or information. The creature can retry any Knowledge skill check it has made within the past minute, gaining an insight bonus on the check equal to your Wisdom modifier." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="memory lapse" l6="modify memory" l8="moment of prescience"}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Abraxas~Amaznen~Bharnarol~Brigh~Erecura~Eritrice~Fandarra~Farfarello~Hydim~Irori~Kelinahat~Kroina~Lissala~Lissala (pre-Earthfall)~Maat~Magdh~Mephistopheles~Nethys~Ng~Norgorber~Nyarlathotep (Black Pharaoh)~Nyarlathotep (Faceless Sphinx)~Nyarlathotep (Haunter of the Dark)~Pavnuri~Pharasma~Ptah~Rytara~Sivanah~Slandrais~Thuskchoon~Tsathoggua~Ulon~Vapula~Velgaas~Yog-Sothoth~Zohls"}

::ab[Read Minds (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹remote viewing/#rem›› power of the Knowledge domain" l=8 icon=magic standard="You can broaden your mental spectrum to encompass those around you. Doing so allows you to read the mind of every creature within 30 feet as if you had cast ‹spell/detect thoughts›. This ability allows you to read the surface thoughts of any creature that you are aware of after only 1 round of concentration. Creatures in this area are allowed a Will save to negate the effect. The DC of this Will save is 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l3="seek thoughts" l5="telepathic bond" l8="mind blank"}

espionage.name: Espionage
description: This subdomain is associated with both the ‹domain/Knowledge› and ‹domain/Trickery› domains.

travel.name: Travel
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You are an explorer and find enlightenment in the simple joy of travel, be it by foot or conveyance or magic.
::ab[Speedy (Ex)]{id=speed icon=power passive="Increase your base speed by 10 feet."}

::ab[Agile Feet (Su)]{id=feet icon=boost free="You can gain increased mobility for 1 round. For the next round, you ignore all ‹rule/difficult terrain› and do not take any penalties for moving through it." useMod=Wis3}

::ab[Dimensional Hop (Sp)]{l=8 icon=magic provokes=No move="You can teleport. You must have line of sight to your destination to use this ability. You can bring other willing creatures with you, but you must expend an equal amount of distance for each creature brought." usage="You can travel up to 10 feet per cleric level per day. This teleportation must be used in 5-foot increments."}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="longstrider~locate object~fly~dimension door~teleport~find the path~greater teleport~phase door~astral projection" save=domain}

::ab[Door Sight (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹agile feet/#feet›› power of the Travel domain" icon=magic ability="You can lay your hand upon any surface and see what is on the other side, as if using ‹spell/clairvoyance›. Using this power takes 1 minute, during which time you must be touching the surface you want to see through. You can keep looking for as long as 10 minutes with each use of this power, but must touch the surface and take no other action the entire time. The surface cannot be thicker than 6 inches plus 1 inch per cleric level you possess." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="expeditious retreat" l4="locate creature" l9="world wave"}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}

::ab[Sacred Threshold (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹base speed increase/#speed›› power of the Travel domain" icon=magic standard="As a standard action, you can bless a door, a window, or another portal with a touch. For 1 minute, you can increase or decrease the DC of any check to unlock or force open the portal by an amount equal to half your cleric level. In addition, your first ally to pass through the portal during this time gains an amount of ‹rule/temporary hit points› equal to 1d4 + 1 for every 2 cleric levels you have. These temporary hit points last for 1 minute." useMod=Wis3}

::ab[Travel as One (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹agile feet/#feet›› power of the Travel domain" icon=boost passive="When you cast a spell with the teleportation descriptor, treat your caster level as 3 higher for the purpose of determining how many additional creatures you can bring with you. In addition, you and any creatures you teleport gain a number of temporary hit points equal to your level that disappear after you reach your destination; these offset any damage you might take from teleportation mishaps or attempting to teleport into a solid body."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="open and shut" l2=knock l3="urban step" l9="teleportation circle"}

::ab[Silver-Tongued Haggler (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹agile feet/#feet›› power of the Travel domain" icon=boost free="Whenever you make a Bluff, Diplomacy, or Sense Motive check, you can grant yourself a bonus on the roll equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum +1)." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="floating disk" l5="overland flight" l9=gate}

trickery.name: Trickery
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You are a master of illusions and deceptions.
::ab[Class Skills (Ex)]{icon=skill passive="‹skill/Bluff› (CHA), ‹skill/Disguise› (CHA), and ‹skill/Stealth› (DEX) are class skills."}

::ab[Copycat (Sp)]{id=cat icon=magic move="You can create an illusory double of yourself. This double functions as a single ‹spell/mirror image› and lasts for a number of rounds equal to your cleric level, or until the illusory duplicate is dispelled or destroyed. You can have no more than one copycat at a time. This ability does not stack with the *mirror image* spell." useMod=Wis3}

::ab[Master's Illusion (Sp)]{id=ill l=8 icon=protect standard="You can create an illusion that hides the appearance of yourself and any number of allies within 30 feet for 1 round per cleric level. This ability otherwise functions like the spell ‹spell/veil›. The save DC to disbelive this effect is equal to 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier." useNC}
@HL[Replacement Power:] Note: Only creatures with the ‹trait/Kobold Faith› trait can take this subdomain.

::ab[Chameleon Aspect (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹copycat/#cat›› power of the Trickery domain" icon=boost swift="You can subtly alter the color of your scales, blending them with the surrounding environment. While under the effect of this power, you gain ‹rule/concealment› from creatures more than 10 feet away (attacks have a 20% miss chance), and total concealment from creatures more than 40 feet away (attacks have a 50% miss chance)." useMod=Wis3 useUnit=round}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1=alarm l5="illusory wall" l6=veil}

::ab[Sudden Shift (Sp)]{replace="The ‹‹copycat/#cat›› power of the Trickery domain" icon=power immediate="In the blink of an eye, you can appear somewhere else. After you are missed by a melee attack, you can teleport up to 10 feet to a space that you can see. This space must be inside the reach of the creature that attacked you." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="mirror image" l7="project image"}

::ab[Deep Cover (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹copycat/#cat›› power of the Trickery domain" icon=def ability="When you prepare your spells, you can also choose one cover identity - whether that of a real person or a fictitious one. You can assume the disguise of your cover identity in half the normal amount of time. When targeted by a spell or effect that would compromise your chosen disguise (such as ‹spell/detect evil›, ‹spell/detect thoughts›, or ‹spell/zone of truth›), as an immediate action you can force the creature using the ability to attempt a Will save (DC = 10 + 1/2 your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier). If the creature fails, it gains false information in keeping with your cover identity. You can use this false information ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="anonymous interaction" l4="zone of silence" l8="mind blank"}

::ab[More for Me (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹copycat/#cat›› ability of the Trickery domain" icon=magic immediate="When another character within 30 feet casts a spell with a range greater than touch, you can attempt a caster level check (DC = 15 + the spell's level). If you succeed at the check, you receive the spell's benefit instead of one of the spell's intended targets (chosen by you). If you are already a target of the spell, you are affected as though you were targeted by the same spell twice (which may or may not benefit you; remember that bonuses from the same source do not stack). This ability does not grant you knowledge of the spell being cast." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="masterwork transformation" l6="guards and wards" l8="create demiplane"}

::ab[Fool's Privilege (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹copycat/#cat›› ability of the Trickery domain" icon=def swift="You can use this power when you fail a Bluff, Diplomacy, or Intimidate check outside of combat. You suffer no negative effects due to the failed check, and the next round you can attempt the check again without the usual penalty for a failed attempt." useInc="4~cleric~1" useF="1~1~4"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="sow thought" l3=suggestion l6="mass suggestion"}

::list[Associated Deities]{hl link=faith all="Achaekek~Alichino~Andirifkhu~Areshkagal~Bastet~Besmara~Calistria~Dahak~Droskar~Gavidya~Lamashtu~Lao Shu Po~Lorthact~Mahathallah~Mestama~Muronna~Nivi Rhombodazzle~Norgorber~Nyarlathotep (Black Pharaoh)~Ruzel~Sun Wukong~Thamir Gixx~The Lantern King~Verex~Zogmugot"}

::ab[Thief of the Gods (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹master's illusion/#ill›› power of the Trickery domain" l=8 icon=roll free="When you make a Disable Device or Sleight of Hand check, you can roll twice and take the higher result." useInc="2~cleric" useF="8~4~2"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l3="locate object" l7="ethereal jaunt"}

A cleric (or any other character capable of selecting a domain) who worships the deity in question can choose to gain the variant domain power upon first gaining the domain in question, but the choice to replace the domain power must be made immediately upon gaining access to that domain and cannot be changed thereafter.

While the church of ‹faith/Asmodeus› periodically endorses the use of possession for certain reasons, it is usually vehemently against unsanctioned possession and the creation of uncontrolled undead forces. Asmodeans have a particular hatred for celestials who partake in acts of possession. Such outsiders are hunted down, and the Church of Asmodeus may offer its exorcising agents' services pro bono for the chance to strike at a particularly hated celestial. The eventual consequence of such arrangements - often left unsaid - is that Asmodeans track those they have helped in this way, and often return to force those individuals to host a ‹family/devil› for a period of predetermined length as recompense for their prior service.

::ab[Deceptive Reprieve (Sp)]{replace="The ‹‹copycat/#cat›› power of the Trickery domain" icon=protect standard="When you touch a creature under direct mental control (such as that granted via ‹spell/dominate person›, but not via ‹spell/charm person›) or the victim of ‹rule/possession›, that creature can attempt a new Will save against the control or possession effect with a +2 bonus. If the creature succeeds, the effect or possession is temporarily halted, as per ‹spell/protection from evil›, for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your character level. While this ability is active, the target takes a -2 penalty on saves against new mind-affecting effects and new attempts at possession." useMod=Wis3}

void.name: Void
description: ‹SOURCE Book of the Damned/182;Gods and Magic/53;Horror Adventures/49;Bestiary 4/134;Inner Sea World Guide/217›
@HL[Granted Powers:] You can call upon the cold darkness between the stars to gain flight, travel to other worlds, or summon monsters from beyond to do your bidding.
::ab[Guarded Mind (Ex)]{id=mind icon=def passive="You gain a +2 insight bonus on saving throws against all mind-affecting effects."}
:::ab{id=part l=8 icon=magic title="Part the Veil (Su)" action="Swift Action" useInc="2~cleric" useF="8~4~2"}

You can lace spells you cast with the raw madness that waits in the outer darkness. Activating this ability must be done as you cast a spell that targets a single creature and that allows a Will saving throw to negate or reduce the spell's primary effect. If the target fails to resist the spell, the target is also ‹misc/confused› for a number of rounds equal to the spell's level as visions of the void cause temporary insanity.

The victim must succeed at a new saving throw each round to end the effect; these additional saving throws apply only to the additional confusion effect and not to the original spell effect. Part the veil is a mind-affecting effect.
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="feather fall~levitate~fly~lesser planar binding~overland flight~planar binding~reverse gravity~greater planar binding~interplanetary teleport" save=domain}
‹SOURCE Horror Adventures/49;People of the Stars/23;Inner Sea Gods/224;Pathfinder #46: Wake of the Watcher/62;Paizo Blog - Golarion Day Subdomains/1;Bestiary 4/135›

::ab[It Came from Beyond (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹guarded mind/#mind›› power of the Void domain" icon=boost passive="Once per day when you cast a summoning spell, any one creature you summon is more powerful than normal. The creature gains the ‹template/advanced« creature› simple template. If you summon more than one creature with a spell, only one of the summoned creatures gains the advanced creature simple template. A summoned creature that gains the advanced creature simple template in this manner looks unusually deformed or hideous. This ability only works on spells you cast as a cleric - it does not work on spellcasting abilities gained from any other spellcasting classes you might have."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="summon monster II" l5="summon monster V" l7=insanity}
‹SOURCE Book of the Damned/181;Horror Adventures/49;Inner Sea Gods/225›

::ab[Aura of Isolation (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹part the veil/#part›› power of the Void domain" icon=lower standard="You can create a 20-foot aura that causes enemies within to be overcome with feelings of isolation and loss. Your enemies treat the aura as ‹rule/difficult terrain›, as they become sluggish within its area of effect. Furthermore, while within the aura, your enemies can't ‹rule/flank› with one another, nor can they use or benefit from the ‹rule/aid another<_2› action. This is a mind-affecting emotion effect." useMod=Wis3 useUnit=round useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l4="crushing despair" l6="wall of force" l8="prismatic wall"}
‹SOURCE Horror Adventures/49;Bestiary 4/135;Paizo Blog - Golarion Day Subdomains/1;Pathfinder #46: Wake of the Watcher/62;Inner Sea Gods/227;People of the Stars/23›

::ab[The Stars Are Right (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹part the veil/#part›› power of the Void domain" icon=magic passive="If you prepare your cleric spells while the stars are visible to you, you may spontaneously cast any of your Stars subdomain domain spells by swapping out a spell of an equal spell level. Any Stars subdomain spells that you cast while the stars are visible to you heal you of damage equal to the spell's level as you cast the spell."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="hypnotic pattern" l7=sunbeam l9="meteor swarm"}

war.name: War
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You are a crusader for your god, always ready and willing to fight to defend your faith.
::ab[Battle Rage (Sp)]{id=rage icon=boost standard="You can touch a creature to give it a bonus on melee damage rolls equal to 1/2 your cleric level for 1 round (minimum +1)." useMod=Wis3}

::ab[Weapon Master (Su)]{id=weap l=8 icon=boost swift="You gain the use of one ‹main/combat feat›. You can change the feat chosen each time you use this ability. You must meet the prerequisites to use this feat." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="magic weapon~spiritual weapon~magic vestment~divine power~flame strike~blade barrier~power word blind~power word stun~power word kill" save=domain}

::ab[Wounding Blade (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹weapon master/#weap›› power of the War domain" l=8 icon=boost standard="You can give a weapon that you touch the ‹magic-enh/wounding› special weapon quality for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level." useInc="4~cleric~8" useF="8~1~4"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l3="vampiric touch" l5="wall of thorns" l7="mass inflict serious wounds"}

::ab[Divine Challenge (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹battle rage/#rage›› power of the War domain" icon=boost swift="You can challenge a visible foe within 30 feet, gaining a +1 sacred bonus to your AC against that creature's attacks and a bonus equal to 1/2 your cleric level on Bluff skill checks to feint against it. These bonuses last for a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="warding weapon" l5="dance of a hundred cuts" l8="dance of a thousand cuts"}

::ab[Seize the Initiative (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹battle rage/#rage›› power of the War domain" icon=roll ability="Whenever you and your allies roll for initiative, you can grant one ally within 30 feet the ability to roll twice and take either result. This decision is made before results are revealed." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2=aid l5="greater command" l8="greater planar ally"}

water.name: Water
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] You can manipulate water and mist and ice, conjure creatures of water, and resist cold.

::ab[Icicle (Sp)]{id=icicle icon=zap standard="You can fire an icicle from your finger, targeting any foe within 30 feet as a ranged touch attack. The icicle deals 1d6 points of cold damage + 1 point for every two cleric levels you possess." useMod=Wis3}
::ab[Cold Resistance (Ex)]{id=res icon=def l6="Gain ‹umr/resist› cold 10." l12="The resistance increases to 20." l20="You gain ‹umr/immunity› to cold."}

::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="obscuring mist~fog cloud~water breathing~control water~ice storm~cone of cold~elemental body IV|water only~horrid wilting~elemental swarm|water spell only" save=domain}
‹SOURCE Book of the Damned/180;Goblins of Golarion/27;Inner Sea Gods/225›

::ab[Sift (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹cold resistance/#res›› power of the Water domain" l=6 icon=power standard="Once per day you can reach into water and pull out an object with a maximum gp value of up to 50 gp &times& your class level. This object always has the ‹misc/broken› condition upon being withdrawn from the water. The water you reach into must be at least deep enough to fully immerse yourself in. If you're retrieving an object that would not normally float, assume it rests on top of or is entwined with debris that does float. Objects retrieved in this manner disappear after 24 hours if they're not already used up or otherwise destroyed before then." imp12="The objects that you retrieve are not broken." imp20="You can retrieve objects worth up to 5,000 gp."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="make whole" l5="major creation" l6="animate objects"}

::ab[Go with the Flow (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹icicle/#icicle›› ability of the Water domain" icon=touch standard="You can touch a creature to suppress its strong emotions. The target is affected as the ‹spell/calm emotions› spell, except it can still take violent actions and violent actions against the target do not end the effect. This effect lasts a number of rounds equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum 1). You can use this ability a number times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier."}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2="cat's grace" l4="freedom of movement" l6="fluid form" l8="mind blank"}

::ab[Body of Ice (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹cold resistance/#res›› power of the Water domain" l=8 icon=boost standard="You can transmute your body and equipment to ice for a period of time. You can end the transmutation with a free action on your turn. When you take on the form of ice, you are ‹umr/immune› to cold and have DR 5/-, but you take twice the normal amount of damage from fire." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l7="freezing sphere" l9="polar ray"}

::ab[Surge (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹icicle/#icicle›› power of the Water domain" icon=line standard="You can cause a mighty wave to appear that pushes or pulls a single creature. Make a combat maneuver check against the target, using your cleric level + your Wisdom modifier as your CMB. If successful, you may pull or push the creature as if using the ‹rule/bull rush› or ‹rule/drag› combat maneuver." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l2=slipstream l3="water walk" l9=tsunami}
‹SOURCE Book of the Damned/181;Inner Sea Gods/226;Pathfinder #80: Empty Graves/65›

::ab[Current Flow (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹icicle/#icicle›› power of the Water domain" icon=boost free="You can increase either your base speed or your swim speed by 10 feet. While swimming, you gain a bonus on Swim checks equal to half your class level (minimum 1). These effects last for a number of rounds equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum 1)." useMod=Wis3}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l1="hydraulic push" l2=slipstream l5="elemental body II" l6="fluid form"}

weather.name: Weather
description: @HL[Granted Powers:] With power over storm and sky, you can call down the wrath of the gods upon the world below.

::ab[Storm Burst (Sp)]{id=burst icon=zap standard="You can create a storm burst targeting any foe within 30 feet as a ranged touch attack. The storm burst deals 1d6 points of nonlethal damage + 1 point for every two cleric levels you possess. In addition, the target is buffeted by winds and rain, causing it to take a -2 penalty on attack rolls for 1 round." useMod=Wis3}

::ab[Lightning Lord (Sp)]{id=lord l=8 icon=zap standard="You can call down a number of bolts of lightning per day equal to your cleric level. You can call down as many bolts as you want with a single action, but no creature can be the target of more than one bolt and no two targets can be more than 30 feet apart. This ability otherwise functions as *call lightning.*"}
::spelllist[Domain Spells]{all="obscuring mist~fog cloud~call lightning~sleet storm~ice storm~control winds~control weather~whirlwind~storm of vengeance" save=domain}
::prereq{other="This subdomain requires the ‹trait/Acolyte of Apocrypha› trait to access."}

::ab[Refreshing Rain (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹lightning lord/#lord›› ability of the Weather domain" l=8 icon=aid standard="You can call a brief shower of rain in a 30-foot radius. Creatures in the area are healed of an amount of nonlethal damage equal to double your cleric level and are no longer ‹misc/exhausted›, ‹misc/fatigued›, ‹misc/nauseated›, or ‹misc/sickened›." useInc="4~cleric~8" useF="8~1~4"}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l3="hydraulic torrent" l4="control water" l5="fickle winds" l9=tsunami}

::ab[Untouched by the Seasons (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹storm burst/#burst›› power of the Weather domain" icon=protect standard="By touching a creature, you can grant it the benefits of ‹spell/endure elements›, which last for 1 hour per cleric level." useMod=Wis3}

::ab[Gale Aura (Su)]{replace="The ‹‹lightning lord/#lord›› power of the Weather domain" icon=lower l=6 standard="You can create a 30-foot aura of gale-like winds that slows the progress of enemies. Creatures in the aura cannot take a 5-foot step. Enemies in the aura treat each square that brings them closer to you as ‹rule/difficult terrain›. They can move normally in any other direction." useL=cleric useNC}
::spelllist[Replacement Domain Spells]{from=domain l5="call lightning storm" l6=sirocco}
